monthly.2016-04: Eastside King County, WA edged out the pack with 140 good-outdoor hours in April 2016, while Florida and Hawaii trailed as high heat and strong UV pushed them past the comfort zone.
monthly.2016-05: Snohomish and Eastside King (WA) tied for the May 2016 crown at ~405 good-outdoor hours, while Charlotte County, FL trailed badly at 284—scorched by heat and soaked by 156mm of rain.
monthly.2016-06: Eastside King edged out Snohomish 403h to 399h for June 2016's top outdoor hours — essentially tied — while Charlotte County trailed under 204mm of rain and Albemarle baked past 35°C.
monthly.2016-07: Eastside King ran away with July 2016 at 424 good-outdoor hours (88% of daylight), while Albemarle trailed at 194 — the Pacific Northwest's mild temps beat the East Coast's heat and rain.
monthly.2016-08: Snohomish edged Eastside King 359 to 353 outdoor hours in Aug 2016 — essentially a tie, with King's extra 7mm of rain the only meaningful separator.
monthly.2016-09: Snohomish and Eastside King counties tied for September's outdoor crown at 92% of daylight hours, while Santa Clara trailed the pack at 63% thanks to scorching 36°C heat and punishing UV.
monthly.2016-10: Albemarle County, VA edged out the pack with 314 good-outdoor hours last October, while soggy Snohomish and Eastside King in Washington trailed under roughly 260 mm of rain.
monthly.2016-11: Charlotte County, FL topped November 2016 with 314 good-outdoor hours, edging the Bay Area twins thanks to warmer temps while soggy Western Washington trailed under 200+ mm of rain.
monthly.2016-12: Charlotte County, FL and Maui tied at 310 outdoor-friendly hours last December, while the Pacific Northwest shivered under 25 — Eastside King and Snohomish were simply too cold.
monthly.2017-01: Charlotte County, FL led January 2017 with 313 good-outdoor hours (97% of daytime), while the Pacific Northwest counties trailed badly — Snohomish managed just 35 — thanks to persistent winter cold.
monthly.2017-02: Maui County led with 287 outdoor-friendly hours in February 2017, while Eastside King and Snohomish tied near the bottom around 60 hours — done in by cold and relentless Pacific Northwest rain.
monthly.2017-03: San Francisco and Santa Clara tied at 319 outdoor hours in March 2017, while Eastside King got drenched with 252mm of rain to eke out just 210.
monthly.2017-04: Snohomish County, WA led April 2017 with 338 good-outdoor hours, while Charlotte County, FL trailed at 250 — tropical heat and fierce UV pushed Florida and Hawaii out of the sweet spot.
monthly.2017-05: Westchester County, NY led May 2017 with 399 outdoor-friendly hours, while Charlotte County, FL trailed at 245, hobbled by Florida heat and punishing UV.

monthly.2017-07: Eastside King County, WA edged out the pack with 355 good-outdoor hours in July 2017, while Santa Clara and Albemarle lagged near 217 hours, baked out by peaks above 36°C.
monthly.2017-08: Westchester County, NY narrowly edged out a tight pack for August 2017's best outdoor hours, while Charlotte County, FL trailed the field under a drenching 440mm of rain.
monthly.2017-09: Snohomish and Westchester tied for the top spot with ~335 outdoor-friendly hours in Sep 2017, while Charlotte County, FL trailed at 229 hours, drowned by nearly a foot of rain.

range_overview.last1y: San Francisco led the pack with 3,685 golden outdoor hours thanks to its famously mild fog-cooled summers, while Westchester trailed at just 2,553 — knocked down by humid East Coast heat spikes topping 39°C.
range_overview.last5y: San Francisco takes the crown with 18,225 perfect-for-outdoors hours thanks to its famously mild fog-cooled summers, while soggy Charlotte County, Florida lags at 14,773 — drowned by nearly seven feet of rain and relentless subtropical heat.
range_overview.last10y: San Francisco tops the decade with 36,023 golden outdoor hours thanks to its famously mild fog-cooled summers, while soggy Westchester trails at 27,386 — nearly twice the rain and winters too cold to count.

santa_clara_ca.best_time: October and November shine with 85–95% good daytime hours, mild peaks near 26–34°C, dry skies, and gentler UV.
santa_clara_ca.strengths: Reliably dry, sunny daytime conditions nearly year-round, plus mild winters that keep good outdoor hours above 88% from November through January.
santa_clara_ca.watch_out: July through September brings extreme UV near 11, peaks pushing 35–37°C, and the lowest share of good daytime hours, around 53–63%.

eastside_king_wa.best_time: May through September deliver 76–90% good daytime hours with mild peaks in the mid-20s°C and notably dry mid-summer.
eastside_king_wa.strengths: Exceptionally dry Julys (just 22mm rain) and a long sunny stretch from May through October make outdoor planning reliable.
eastside_king_wa.watch_out: December through February are rough, with only 28–34% good hours, cold 4°C averages, and 146–203mm of relentless rain.

san_francisco_ca.best_time: September and October shine with warm peaks near 30°C, mild averages, minimal rain, and moderate UV—ideal for outdoor plans.
san_francisco_ca.strengths: San Francisco delivers remarkably consistent mild temperatures year-round and exceptionally high 'good hours' percentages in fall and late autumn.
san_francisco_ca.watch_out: December and January bring the heaviest rain (118–133mm) and shortest, coolest days, making that stretch the soggiest for outdoor activity.

snohomish_wa.best_time: May through September deliver 76–91% good daytime hours with mild peaks near 25–31°C and dry stretches, especially July's 19mm rainfall.
snohomish_wa.strengths: Exceptionally dry, sunny late summer with September hitting 91% good daytime hours and moderate UV keeping outdoor sessions comfortable.
snohomish_wa.watch_out: November through January is brutal, with 26–30% good hours, relentless 162–186mm monthly rain, chilly 4°C averages, and barely any UV.

charlotte_fl.best_time: December through February deliver 95–98% good daytime hours with mild 17–20°C averages, low UV, and the year's lightest rainfall.
charlotte_fl.strengths: Charlotte County stacks an exceptionally long sunny winter with warm peaks near 28–30°C, giving more comfortable outdoor hours than most counties.
charlotte_fl.watch_out: June through September brings 190–243mm monthly rain, 28°C humidity, and UV above 10, cutting good daytime hours to just 54–59%.

albemarle_va.best_time: April through October shine, with October offering 89% good daytime hours and May close behind at 80%.
albemarle_va.strengths: Remarkably consistent spring and fall outdoor windows, plus a standout October that beats most counties for reliable dry, mild daylight.
albemarle_va.watch_out: July brings the worst stretch as peaks hit 37°C with UV near 11 and only half the daytime rated good.

westchester_ny.best_time: May through October shine, with October delivering 91% good daytime hours and September close behind at 85% — crisp, comfortable, and dry enough.
westchester_ny.strengths: Westchester stacks a long outdoor season from April to October and an unusually pleasant autumn, with mild temps and low UV well into fall.
westchester_ny.watch_out: December through February is the rough stretch — barely 13–21% good daytime hours, freezing averages, and steady rain or snow shutting outdoor plans down.

maui_hi.best_time: November through January deliver the highest share of good daytime hours with mild temps, gentle UV, and manageable rain.
maui_hi.strengths: Year-round warmth and a remarkably high share of good outdoor hours, topping 87% of daytime in late fall and winter.
maui_hi.watch_out: August is the roughest stretch, with only 65% good daytime hours, peak UV near 11.7, and lingering summer heat.

profiles.name: Sun Seeker
profiles.label: 🔆 Sun Seeker
profiles.desc: Beach-day strict — clear skies, mild temps, low humidity, clean air.

profiles.name: Goldilocks
profiles.label: ☀ Goldilocks
profiles.desc: Default. Mild temps, low UV, dry, not overcast, not muggy, AQI ≤ 100.

profiles.name: Classic
profiles.label: 🌤 Classic
profiles.desc: The original 4-rule check: daytime, mild temp, safe UV, dry. No air-quality check.

profiles.name: Cool & Cloudy
profiles.label: 🌥 Cool & Cloudy
profiles.desc: Likes brisk overcast days, hates muggy heat. Tolerates moderate AQI.

profiles.name: All-Weather
profiles.label: 🥾 All-Weather
profiles.desc: Hikes rain-or-shine — only true extremes count, AQI up to 'unhealthy for sensitive groups'.
